name: Denied comp for chem exposure in West Valley—can I sue instead?
description: Appeal comp; sue third parties only.

mainEntity.name: Denied comp for chem exposure in West Valley—can I sue instead?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal comp; sue third parties only.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, workers' comp exclusivity blocks employer suits; appeal comp or target third parties.** Utah law mandates comp route first.[6] Key factors: exhaust appeals, identify non-immune defendants. Dual track possible; win comp then sue others. Lawyer strategizes both.
